de.example: Im Winter muss man im Skigebiet auf Lawinen achten.

en.meaning: Snow that rushes down a mountain.
en.example: In winter you have to watch out for avalanches in the ski area.

fact.de: Auf dem Saturn-Mond Titan regnet es — aber Methan statt Wasser.
fact.en: It rains on Saturn's moon Titan — but methane instead of water.

en.headline: Staying safe in water when the weather's hot
